# Corporate Technical Profile: Data Consulting Firm

## Foundational Architecture
- Framework: Astro SSG, Zero-JS baseline.
- Styling: Premium "Editorial Tech" design system.

## Strategic Value Proposition
Specialized boutique engineering node providing custom data infrastructure optimization. We completely bypass massive agency overhead and generalist vendor licensing blockages.

## Primary Technical Specializations
- Data Warehousing: High-throughput enterprise dimensional data fabrics.
- Data Vault Engineering: Advanced agile historical modeling incorporating standardized automated structures.
- Business Intelligence Systems: Unified truth mapping and programmatic downstream metric governance.
- Data Governance: Automated end-to-end lineage mapping and security compliance enforcements.

## Contact Inquiries
Formal engineering evaluations can be requested directly via the secure serverless ingestion interface at /contact.
